cases.question: Which Volcanic Activity subtype events affected provinces in Regions III, V, or VI?
cases.generated_sparql:
PREFIX : <https://sakuna.ph/>
PREFIX org: <https://sakuna.ph/org/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>
PREFIX cur: <http://qudt.org/vocab/currency/>
SELECT ?event ?eventName ?startDate ?locationLabel
WHERE {
  # 1. Identify the Disaster Event and its Volcanic Activity Type
  ?event a :DisasterEvent ;
         :hasDisasterType ?volcanicActivity .

  # Ensure the activity rolls up to the Volcanic Activity category
  ?volcanicActivity skos:broader* ?majorType .
  FILTER (?majorType = :VolcanicActivity) 

  # Assuming we want to match specific subtypes (e.g., Lahar, Ashfall)
  # If the type itself must be a known subtype URI:
  ?event :hasDisasterType ?specificActivity .

  # 2. Link the Event to a Location
  ?event :hasLocation ?location .

  # 3. Restrict the location to Provinces in Regions III, V, or VI
  ?location :isPartOf ?province . # Traverse up to the Province level where containment is confirmed
  ?province :isPartOf ?region ;
            rdfs:label ?regionLabel .

  VALUES ?region { 
    :RegionIII :RegionV :RegionVI 
  }

  # Optional: Retrieve the readable names for context
  OPTIONAL { ?event :eventName ?eventName }
  OPTIONAL { ?location rdfs:label ?locationLabel }

}
ORDER BY DESC(?startDate)

cases.question: How many evacuation centers were recorded for Tropical Cyclone events in CALABARZON during 2021, grouped by source?
cases.generated_sparql:
PREFIX : <https://sakuna.ph/>
PREFIX org: <https://sakuna.ph/org/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>

PREFIX prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>
PREFIX cur: <http://qudt.org/vocab/currency/>
SELECT ?source (COUNT(?ap) AS ?countOfCenters)
WHERE {
  ?event a :DisasterEvent ;
         :hasDisasterType ?dtype ;
         :hasLocation ?regionNode ;
         :startDate ?startTime .

  # Filter by Type (Tropical Cyclone) and Location (CALABARZON)
  VALUES ?dtype { :TropicalCyclone } .
  ?regionNode a :Region ;
               rdfs:label ?calabarzonLabel . # Assuming CALABARZON is labeled
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?calabarzonLabel, "CALABARZON"))

  # Filter by Year 2021
  FILTER(YEAR(?startTime) = 2021)

  # Link to Affected Population and Evacuation Centers
  ?event :hasAffectedPopulation ?ap .
  # The presence of the :evacuationCenters property indicates they were recorded.
  OPTIONAL { ?ap :evacuationCenters ?center . }

  # Provenance link (Source)
  ?event prov:wasAttributedTo ?source .

} GROUP BY ?source
ORDER BY DESC(?countOfCenters)
